senses.definition_dg: Kutoka phatu. Kuonyesa phatu ambapho mutu au chitu chinala.

examples.en: He comes from Ukunda village.
examples.sw: Anatoka kijiji cha Ukunda.

senses.definition_dg: Kukubali kpwa moyo na msamaha. Kuridhika na mutu au chitu.

examples.en: I ask for your indulgence for my mistakes.
examples.sw: Naomba radhi kwa makosa yangu.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya furaha na kpwenye moyo mnono. Kuridhika na maisha.

examples.dg: Ana raha kpwa sababu mwanawe wavuka.
examples.en: She is happy because her child passed.
examples.sw: Ana furaha kwa sababu mtoto wake amefaulu.

senses.definition_en: security for a loan, e.g. use of a field or property until the loan is
senses.definition_dg: Chitu ambacho chinaihwa dza dhamana ya deni. Munda au mali inayoikpwa hadi deni ririphwe.

examples.dg: Waika mundawe rahani ili ahale mkopo.
examples.en: He put his farm as security to get a loan.
examples.sw: Aliweka shamba lake rahani ili apate mkopo.

sub_entries.definition_sw: dhamana mtu anayotoa kwa mtu mwingine ili apate mkopo

examples.en: I am offering my coconut palms as security

senses.definition_dg: Chitu ambacho si chigumu kuhenda, au ambacho ni cha bei ya tsini.

examples.en: To cultivate using a tractor is easy
examples.sw: Kulima kwa trekta ni rahisi.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu mkulu wa kuongoza tsi. Mkpwulu wa serikali.

examples.dg: Raisi wagomba na atu usiku wa dzana.
examples.en: The president addressed the people last night.
examples.sw: Rais alihutubia watu usiku wa jana.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu ariye wa tsi fulani. Uraiya ni kukala wa tsi iyo kpwa sheria.

examples.dg: Chila mutu ariye raiya ana haki ya kupiga kura.
examples.en: Every citizen has the right to vote.
examples.sw: Kila raia ana haki ya kupiga kura.

equivalents_en: voice (in the sense of the voice of a person which is identifyable by

senses.definition_en: voice (in the sense of the voice of a person which is identifyable by
senses.definition_dg: Sauti ya mutu ambayo inamanyikana kpwa kumsikira tu. Chila mutu ana raka rakpwe.

examples.dg: Nikamanya raka ra baba kula kure.
examples.en: I recognized father's voice from far away.
examples.sw: Nilimtambua baba kwa sauti yake kutoka mbali.

equivalents_en: ceremony used by a traditional healer to determine the cause and

senses.definition_en: ceremony used by a traditional healer to determine the cause and
senses.definition_dg: Njia ya chizamani ya kuchunguza ugonjwa au tatizo na kujua sababu na dawa yake. Mganga anaitumira kpwa kupiga ramli.

examples.dg: Mganga wapiga ramli na kugundua sababu ya ugonjwa.
examples.en: The healer performed a divination ceremony and discovered the cause of the illness.
examples.sw: Mganga alipiga ramli na kugundua sababu ya ugonjwa.

equivalents_en: weave within a frame (e.g. traditional design of bed)

senses.definition_en: to weave within a frame (e.g. traditional design of bed)
senses.definition_dg: Kufuma chitu ndani ya fumo, dza chitanda cha chizamani.

examples.en: Grandfather is weaving a rope bed frame.
examples.sw: Babu anatengeneza kitanda cha kamba.

sub_entries.definition_en: n.k cha kamba. 2) to plane wood

senses.definition_en: to massage, to set (a broken bone or dislocated joint)
senses.definition_dg: Kukanda mwiri au kusetereza mfupha uriozuka au urivyovundzika.

examples.en: The healer set the dislocated leg.
examples.sw: Mganga aliranga mguu uliokuwa umelegea.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya muonekano wa chitu, dza kundu, nyiru, nyere, au nyiphya.

examples.dg: Rangi ya nyumba ihi ni ya kundu.
examples.en: The colour of this house is red.
examples.sw: Rangi ya nyumba hii ni nyekundu.

senses.definition_dg: Kutoa chitu kula phatu phakpwe au phatu ambapo chikaikpwa.

examples.en: Remove your things from the table.
examples.sw: Toa vitu vyako kwenye meza.

senses.definition_dg: Mali au vitu vya thamani ambavyo vinatumiwa kutengeza faidha. Mtaji.

examples.dg: Rasilmali ya tsi ni muhimu sana.
examples.en: The country's capital is very important.
examples.sw: Rasilmali ya nchi ni muhimu sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa njira ya kisheria au ya serikali. Mambo ga halisi.

examples.en: This meeting is official.
examples.sw: Mkutano huu ni rasmi.

equivalents_en: same e.g. dza chiratu the same as

senses.definition_en: same e.g. dza chiratu the same as
senses.definition_dg: Sawa, mwenga-mwenga. Dza chiratu — sawa-sawa na.

examples.en: Just the same as he said, that's how it is.
examples.sw: Sawa na alivyosema, ndivyo ilivyo.

senses.definition_dg: Kulamuka na kugoduka ligundzu mapema sana.

examples.en: He got up early in the morning to go to the farm.
examples.sw: Aliruka mapema asubuhi kwenda shambani.

senses.definition_dg: Kutokumbuka chitu, kusahau.

examples.en: Don't forget to go to the shop.
examples.sw: Usisahau kwenda dukani.

senses.definition_dg: Kukubali na moyo, kuridhika na mambo ganagohendwa au kuarifiwa.

examples.dg: Akahala vitu vyangu lakini mwenye si razi
examples.en: He took my things but I did not consent
examples.sw: Walichukua vitu vyangu lakini mwenyewe siridhiki.

senses.definition_dg: Kukubali na moyo, kuridhika na mambo ganagohendwa au kuarifiwa.

examples.en: He does not have the blessing of his parents
examples.sw: Walichukua vitu vyangu lakini mwenyewe siridhiki.

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinatumiwa kuonyesa mapatano au masikizano.

examples.dg: Atu osi akala na maneno mare — masikizano manono.
examples.en: All the people had good words — good agreement.
examples.sw: Watu wote walikuwa na maneno mazuri — makubaliano mazuri.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra sifa rinaonyesa chitu ambacho ni chire au kunyooha.

examples.en: A giraffe is a tall animal
examples.sw: Twiga ni mnyama mrefu.

examples.en: KILIMANJARO is a long word
examples.sw: Twiga ni mnyama mrefu.

equivalents_en: come (form used in the present tense only)

senses.definition_en: to come (form used in the present tense only)
senses.definition_dg: Kukpwedza, kutsama. Neno hiri rinatumiwa zaidi kpwa wakati uriopo.

examples.en: He is coming from his village.
examples.sw: Anakuja kutoka kijiji chake.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu chire, chenye urefu munji au kukala dzulu.

examples.en: A tall person
examples.sw: Barua ndefu inachosha kusoma.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhala chitu na kukireha phatu phanjina. Kuleta chitu.

examples.en: Bring water from the well.
examples.sw: Leta maji kutoka kisimani.

sub_entries.definition_en: bring: imperative form used in commands

examples.dg: Mutu hiyu ananirehera maembe chila siku
examples.en: This man brings me mangoes every day

senses.definition_dg: Biashara ya kuguza vitu vidide-vidide kpwa atu mmwenga-mmwenga.

examples.dg: Duka hiri ni ra rejareja, si ra jumla.
examples.en: This shop is for retail, not wholesale.
examples.sw: Duka hili ni la rejareja, si la jumla.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala kufungbwa chigumu, kukala kulegelege.

examples.en: The rope is loose; it has been tied loosely
examples.sw: Kamba iko legelege; ilifungwa kwa udhaifu.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala bila nguvu au kufungbwa chigumu; kulegea.

examples.en: The rope has become loose, tie it again.
examples.sw: Kamba imeregea, funga tena.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu kuhasirwa mwiri kpwa nguvu zikamala na kukala dza akalala.

examples.dg: Achisikira habari mbii, warejera na kugbwa tsini.
examples.en: When she heard the bad news, she collapsed and fell down.
examples.sw: Aliposikia habari mbaya, alilegea na kuanguka chini.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda chitu chikale bila nguvu, kuunguza uchigumu.

examples.en: I loosened my belt
examples.sw: Nililegeza mkanda wangu kwa sababu ulikuwa umekaza.

examples.en: I unscrewed the screw
examples.sw: Nililegeza mkanda wangu kwa sababu ulikuwa umekaza.

equivalents_sw: kukata kitu kama mti na msumeno

senses.definition_sw: kukata kitu kama mti na msumeno
senses.definition_dg: Kukata muhi au chitu kpwa msumeno.

examples.en: He sawed the timber with a saw.
examples.sw: Alikata mbao kwa msumeno.

senses.definition_en: to disagree, to refuse, to reject
senses.definition_dg: Kukahala, kutsama na kukosa kukubali neno.

examples.dg: Warema kuphiya kpwa sababu ana kazi.
examples.en: He refused to go because he has work.
examples.sw: Alikataa kwenda kwa sababu ana kazi.

senses.definition_dg: Kukata chitu kpwa chisu au panga.

examples.en: He cut firewood with a machete.
examples.sw: Alikata kuni kwa panga.

equivalents_en: comb on the head of a cock

senses.definition_en: comb on the head of a cock
senses.definition_dg: Chitu chikundu chinacho kitswani cha dzogoo, upanga wa dzogoo.

examples.en: That cock has a large comb.
examples.sw: Jogoo yule ana upanga mkubwa.

senses.definition_dg: Vitu vya kupambisha mwiri au nyumba. Mapambo.

examples.dg: Mchetu wavwala marembo siku ya arusi.
examples.en: The woman wore ornaments on the wedding day.
examples.sw: Mwanamke alivaa mapambo siku ya arusi.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na uzito munji, kukala chigumu kutsukulwa.

examples.en: This bag is heavy, I cannot carry it.
examples.sw: Mfuko huu ni mzito, siwezi kuubeba.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na uchovu bada ya kuhenda kazi ngumu. Kukala bila nguvu.

examples.en: Why was he tired?
examples.sw: Kwa nini amechoka? Kwa sababu alifanya kazi siku nzima.

senses.definition_dg: Chiungo cha ndani ya mwiri ambacho chinausa uchafu wa mwiri kpwa njira ya mkodzo.

examples.en: A person has two kidneys.
examples.sw: Mtu ana figo mbili.

senses.definition_en: to cut wood into pieces, to chop wood
senses.definition_dg: Kukata kuni kuzitengeneza viryahi-viryahi.

examples.dg: Anarengeta kuni ili zikale tayari kpwa kupika.
examples.en: He is chopping firewood so it is ready for cooking.
examples.sw: Anakata kuni ili ziwe tayari kwa kupikia.

senses.definition_dg: Aina ya tunda kulu ambaro rina madzi manji ndani, ra rangi ya kijani kondze.

examples.dg: Renje ririphokala rikaiva, ni ritamu sana.
examples.en: When the pumpkin is ripe, it is very sweet.
examples.sw: Boga linapoiva, ni tamu sana.

senses.definition_dg: Tunda kulu ra rangi ya kijani kondze na kundu ndani, renye madzi manji matamu.

examples.dg: Renje-madzi ni tunda rizuri siku za dzuwa.
examples.en: Watermelon is a good fruit on hot days.
examples.sw: Tikiti ni tunda zuri siku za joto.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu pha ngozi phanaphounuka na kukala na madzi ndani, kpwa sababu ya kuphywa au kugbwirwa.

examples.dg: Ana renje-renje mguuni kpwa sababu ya viahu viphya.
examples.en: She has a blister on her foot because of new shoes.
examples.sw: Ana lengelenge mguuni kwa sababu ya viatu vipya.

senses.definition_en: to care for someone (usually a child)
senses.definition_dg: Kutundza mwana au mutu na kumuhendekera mambo ganagomuhimu.

examples.en: The mother cared for her child very well.
examples.sw: Mama alimlea mtoto wake vizuri sana.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya rindi.

examples.dg: Rere ni neno ranjina ra rindi.
examples.en: Rere is another word for rindi.
examples.sw: Rere ni neno lingine la rindi.

sub_entries.definition_en: be cared for by someone else (used of children)

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala usingizini.

examples.en: While he was asleep he had a dream
examples.sw: Alipokuwa amelala aliota ndoto.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kutukuha kpwa mwiri au hewa.

examples.dg: Reti ra dzuwa rero ni kulu sana.
examples.en: The heat of the sun today is very intense.
examples.sw: Joto la jua leo ni kali sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na hasira au kulalamika kpwa chitu ambacho hukuridhika nacho.

examples.en: Don't be angry over such small things.
examples.sw: Usikasirike kwa mambo madogo hivyo.

sub_entries.definition_en: annoy someone, to make someone angry

equivalents_en: kutsekera (of a baby) to smile or laugh for the first time

senses.definition_en: , kutsekera (of a baby) to smile or laugh for the first time, to learn to
senses.definition_dg: Mwana mdide kuandza kutseha kpwa mara ya kpwandza. Kumanyikana kpwa anache achiri atsanga.

examples.en: Our baby smiled for the first time yesterday!
examples.sw: Mtoto wetu alianza kutabasamu jana!

equivalents_en: na nda ichikala mutu analonda kuamba ninda mara nyinji nkufupishwa na

senses.definition_en: na nda ichikala mutu analonda kuamba ninda mara nyinji nkufupishwa na
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kisarufi rinaelezera njia ya kufupisha maneno kpwa Chidigo, dza 'ninda' kuwa 'n'nda'.

examples.dg: Kpwa Chidigo, riandzaro rinatumiwa sana kpwa maneno manji.
examples.en: In Digo, contraction is commonly used in many words.
examples.sw: Katika Kidigo, ufupishaji wa maneno hutumika sana.

senses.definition_en: to stop, to leave, to let go, to leave behind
senses.definition_dg: Kuachira chitu, kurichira, au kukosa kuenderera.

examples.en: It rained and then it stopped
examples.sw: Mvua ilinyesha kisha ikaacha.

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinatumiwa kuonyesa si fulani tu bali na mutu au chitu chanjina.

examples.dg: Richa uwe hata sowe achedza n'ndamwambira hivyo
examples.en: Not only you, but your father, if he comes, I will tell him the same thing
examples.sw: Licha ya wewe, hata baba yako atakapokuja nitamwambia hivyo.

senses.definition_en: husk, outer covering of a coconut
senses.definition_dg: Ganda ra kondze ra nazi ambaro ni gumu na rinatengeneza kamba na vitu vinjinavyo.

examples.dg: Marifu ganahumirwa kama kuni, kuhendwa magodoro, na nkutengenezwa nyugbwe
examples.en: The husk of the coconut is used for firewood, for making mattresses, and for making rope
examples.sw: Maganda ya nazi hutumika kama kuni na kutengeneza kamba.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu ambaye anavyalwa wakati mmwenga nawe. Mutu wa umri sawa nawe.

examples.en: Mwachitseko is my agemate
examples.sw: Mwachitseko ni rika langu.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala kunariywa au kuriwa.

examples.en: Unripe bananas are not edible
examples.sw: Ndizi mbichi haziliki.

equivalents_en: kama n’nda. Kpwa mfwano n’ndakpwedza. Dza vivyo sentensi kama Kuamwisa ni kunono nkufupishwa hivi: Kuamwisa n’kunono. Piya mutu achihadzwa kama ‘object’ ya chihendo

senses.definition_en: kama n’nda. Kpwa mfwano n’ndakpwedza. Dza vivyo sentensi kama Kuamwisa ni kunono nkufupishwa hivi: Kuamwisa n’kunono. Piya mutu achihadzwa kama ‘object’ ya chihendo, andika mu ichikala chihendo
senses.definition_dg: Kanuni ya kisarufi ya kuandika Chidigo inayoelezera njia ya kufupisha maneno.

examples.dg: Rikaandikpwa ni kanuni ya kuandika Chidigo.
examples.en: This is a spelling rule for written Digo.
examples.sw: Hii ni kanuni ya kuandika Kidigo.

senses.definition_dg: Kumuusa mwana kunwa maziya ga mayo. Kumurichira mwana kunyonya.

examples.dg: Ni vinono kumrikisa mwana achifika miaka miiri ama zaidi
examples.en: It is good to wean a child when it reaches the age of two years or above
examples.sw: Ni vizuri kumwachisha mtoto kunyonya anapofikisha miaka miwili au zaidi.

senses.definition_en: landing place, place where people disembark after crossing a river
senses.definition_dg: Phatu ambapo atu anatserera kula ngalawani bada ya kutsupa muho au bahari.

examples.dg: Hundakutana phatu pha riko bada ya kutsupa muho.
examples.en: We will meet at the landing place after crossing the river.
examples.sw: Tutakutana mahali pa kutua baada ya kuvuka mto.

examples.dg: Hiri ni riko ra alume siro ra achetu
examples.en: This is the the men's bathing place, not the women's

senses.definition_dg: Kutengeza munda kpwa kulima na kupanda mimea.

examples.en: Father is cultivating the farm with a hoe.
examples.sw: Baba analima shamba kwa jembe.

equivalents_en: clear fields collectively (a group of people take turns to clear

senses.definition_en: to clear fields collectively (a group of people take turns to clear
senses.definition_dg: Atu kuteryana kurima kpwa kubadilishana. Kundi ra atu rakurimirana minda yao kpwa zamu.

examples.dg: Atu a mudzi anarimirana minda yao kpwa siku tafauti.
examples.en: The village people take turns to clear each other's fields collectively.
examples.sw: Watu wa kijiji wanalimiana mashamba yao kwa siku tofauti.

senses.definition_dg: Nguwo ya mchetu ambayo ni mwenga, dza gauni.

examples.en: Mother put on a nice dress yesterday
examples.sw: Mama alivaa gauni zuri jana.

senses.definition_en: to protect, to guard, to look after, to care for
senses.definition_dg: Kutundza na kuikira macho chitu au mutu ili usihasirwe. Kulinda.

examples.dg: Diya ni nyama mzuri wa kurinda kaya
examples.en: The dog is a good animal for protecting the home
examples.sw: Mbwa ni mnyama mzuri wa kulinda nyumbani.

equivalents_en: small hole dug to plant seeds

senses.definition_en: small hole dug to plant seeds
senses.definition_dg: Shimo dide rinachochimbwa ili kupandia mbegu.

examples.dg: Panda mbegu mbiri-mbiri kpwa chila rindi.
examples.en: Plant two seeds in each planting hole.
examples.sw: Panda mbegu mbili mbili kwa kila shimo.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya rindi — shimo dide ra kupandia mbegu.

examples.en: Rindira is the same as rindi (planting hole).
examples.sw: Rindira ni sawa na rindi.

equivalents_en: wait for (e.g. for water to fill a bucket)

senses.definition_en: to wait for (e.g. for water to fill a bucket)
senses.definition_dg: Kukala phatu na kungodzera chitu au mutu.

examples.en: Today the water is slow in coming (only a trickle of water is coming from the pipe, so we have to wait for the bucket to fill)
examples.sw: Leo maji ni ya kusubiri — subiri hadi yajae.

senses.definition_en: to strut, to swagger, to put on airs, to show off, to boast
senses.definition_dg: Kudziunula na kudziona bora kuriko anjina. Kudzionyesa kpwa nguo au matendo.

examples.dg: Usiringe sana, unyenyekevu ni mnono zaidi.
examples.en: Don't show off too much, humility is better.
examples.sw: Usijisifu sana, unyenyekevu ni bora zaidi.

senses.definition_en: to make a girl pregnant, to impregnate a girl
senses.definition_dg: Kumtiya mwanache mimba.

examples.en: The young man impregnated the neighbour's daughter.
examples.sw: Kijana alimtia mimba binti wa jirani.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu mnene mwenye mwiri mkpwulu na wa kunona.

examples.dg: Mutu iye ni ringi-ringi, ana nguvu sana.
examples.en: That person is thickly built, he is very strong.
examples.sw: Mtu yule ni mnene, ana nguvu sana.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuuza wakati ambao chitu chinahendeka.

examples.en: When did you come?
examples.sw: Ulikuja lini? Nilikuja jana.

senses.definition_dg: Kulavya hela au chitu chanjina dza malipo ya deni au huduma.

examples.en: I paid all my debt.
examples.sw: Nililipa deni langu lote.

senses.definition_en: to retaliate, to take vengeance on
senses.definition_dg: Kuriphiza kisasi, kuhenda ubaya kpwa mutu ambaye akakuhenda ubaya.

examples.en: Don't take vengeance, God is the one who will judge.
examples.sw: Usilipize kisasi, Mungu ndiye atakayemhukumu.

senses.definition_dg: Hela au chitu ambacho chinalaviwa dza malipo.

examples.dg: Ripho ra kazi rangu rinakpwedza mwisho wa mwezi.
examples.en: My payment comes at the end of the month.
examples.sw: Malipo yangu yanakuja mwishoni mwa mwezi.

senses.definition_dg: Kutoa matsozi kpwa sababu ya huzuni, utsungu, au furaha.

examples.dg: Mwana anarira kpwa sababu ana njala.
examples.en: The child is crying because he is hungry.
examples.sw: Mtoto analia kwa sababu ana njaa.

senses.definition_dg: Kufikiri kpwa nguvu na kpwa wakati mure kuhusu jambo.

examples.dg: Ririkana vinono kabla ya kuhenda uamuzi.
examples.en: Think hard before making a decision.
examples.sw: Fikiria sana kabla ya kufanya uamuzi.

equivalents_sw: hence right hand side; kulia chakula; kwa hivyo upande wa kulia

senses.definition_sw: hence right hand side; kulia chakula; kwa hivyo upande wa kulia
senses.definition_dg: Kurya na chitu au kula phatu. Piya ni mkono wa kulia — mkono wa kuririra.

examples.en: The right hand side (lit
examples.sw: Mkono wa kulia ndio wa kula nao.

examples.en: Vessels for eating from and cooking with
examples.sw: Mkono wa kulia ndio wa kula nao.

senses.definition_dg: Kulalamika na kurira kpwa wakati mure kuhusu chitu fulani.

examples.dg: Kpwa sababu swino si chochosi, mwimwi kala tamririra sisi, lakini kala mnamririra Mlungu
examples.en: God heard the complaints which you complained to him
examples.sw: Kwa sababu sisi si kitu, nyinyi hamkutulia sisi, bali mlikuwa mnamlilia Mungu.

senses.definition_dg: Kupherekeza nyama marisoni ili arye nyasi.

examples.en: The young man is grazing cattle in the field.
examples.sw: Kijana analisha ng'ombe uwanjani.

senses.definition_dg: Kumpha mutu chakurya au kumuterya kurya.

examples.en: The mother is feeding her small child.
examples.sw: Mama analisha mtoto wake mdogo.

equivalents_en: kago to provide treatment to protect someone's body against witchcraft
equivalents_sw: kuagua ili kulinda mwili wa mtu dhidi ya uchawi

senses.definition_en: kago to provide treatment to protect someone's body against witchcraft
senses.definition_sw: kuagua ili kulinda mwili wa mtu dhidi ya uchawi
senses.definition_dg: Kuagua na kupaka dawa mwirini ili mwiri urindwe na uchawi.

examples.en: The healer treated him with protective medicine against witchcraft.
examples.sw: Mganga alimrisa ili asiharibiwe na uchawi.

senses.definition_en: to receive treatment to protect oneself against witchcraft
senses.definition_sw: kuaguliwa ili kujikinga dhidi ya uchawi
senses.definition_dg: Kupokera dawa ya kpwa mganga ili udzirinde na uchawi.

examples.dg: Waphiya kurisiwa na mganga kpwa sababu ya wasiwasi.
examples.en: He went to receive protective treatment from the healer because of worries.
examples.sw: Alikwenda kuaguliwa na mganga kwa sababu ya wasiwasi.

senses.definition_en: to be in the state whereby a person is able to talk even though their body has died and is decomposing and they are unconscious (to hasten death, the sick person is given water from seven sources to drink, or water is dropped on the
senses.definition_dg: Hali ya mutu ambaye mwiriwe ukafwa lakini achere anagomba, na kuishi zaidi kuriko inavyotarajiwa.

examples.dg: Mutu yuya anarisa — mwiriwe ukafwa lakini achere anagomba.
examples.en: That person is in a lingering state — his body has died but he still speaks.
examples.sw: Mtu yule anaishi zaidi ya matarajio — mwili wake umekufa lakini bado anasema.

sub_entries.definition_sw: mtu kuwa katika hali ya kuweza kusema hata ingawa kukosa fahamu na mwili unaoza (kuharakisha kifo, mgonjwa hupewa maji kutoka sehemu saba tofauti anywe, au kumwagiwa maji kutoka juu ya nyumba)

senses.definition_dg: Chitu cha chuma ambacho chinapigwa ni bunduki.

examples.en: One bullet is enough to get the animal.
examples.sw: Risasi moja inatosha kumpata mnyama.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhala mali au cheo bada ya mutu ariyekuwa nacho kufwa.

examples.en: The child inherited his father's property.
examples.sw: Mtoto alirithi mali ya baba yake.

senses.definition_en: to look in all directions, to be wary
senses.definition_dg: Kuangaliya-angaliya kosi kosi kpwa kuogopa au kudzikinda.

examples.en: To look around in all directions is to keep oneself well-equipped
examples.sw: Kuangalia sehemu zote ni kujikinga — methali ya Kidigo.

senses.definition_en: four shillings, term heard in stories
senses.definition_dg: Shilingi ne za kare. Neno hiri rinasikirwa zaidi kpwa hadisi za kare.

examples.dg: Wagurira chitu na riyale mwenga tu.
examples.en: He bought something for just four shillings.
examples.sw: Alinunua kitu kwa riale moja tu.

equivalents_en: nyendze to hear a ringing or buzzing sound in one's ears
equivalents_sw: tinnitus; kusikia sauti kama ya mdudu sikioni

senses.definition_en: nyendze to hear a ringing or buzzing sound in one's ears
senses.definition_sw: tinnitus; kusikia sauti kama ya mdudu sikioni
senses.definition_dg: Kusikira sauti inayorina au kuvuma ndani ya sikiro, ambayo si ya kondze.

examples.en: He hears a ringing sound in his ears.
examples.sw: Anasikia sauti kama mdudu sikioni.

senses.definition_en: means of subsistence, necessities of life
senses.definition_dg: Vitu vyosi vinavyomuhimu mutu kpwa kuishi, dza chakurya, mavazi, na makalo.

examples.en: God is the one who provides people with sustenance.
examples.sw: Mungu ndiye anayewapa watu riziki.

equivalents_en: noun class 5 and 11 equivalent of cho

senses.definition_en: noun class 5 and 11 equivalent of cho
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra ngʼeli ya 5 na 11 ambaro rinaonyesa chitu kinachomanyikana. Sawa na 'cho' kpwa ngʼeli zanjina.

examples.en: 'Ro' is the class 5 and 11 equivalent of 'cho'.
examples.sw: 'Ro' ni sawa na 'ambalo' kwa ngeli ya 5 na 11.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya mutu isiyoonekana ambayo inamupha uhai. Moyo wa ndani.

examples.dg: Roho ya mutu ni ya Mlungu.
examples.en: A person's soul belongs to God.
examples.sw: Roho ya mtu ni ya Mungu.

sub_entries.definition_en: roho to go into shock after hearing bad news
sub_entries.definition_sw: kushtuka baada ya kusikia habari mbaya

senses.definition_dg: Kuimba (neno risiro ra kawaida sana).

examples.en: He knows how to sing well.
examples.sw: Anajua kuimba vizuri.

equivalents_en: place where men meet to teach the young how to behave
equivalents_sw: mahali ambapo wavulana hufundzwa tabia nzuri na wazee

senses.definition_en: place where men meet to teach the young how to behave
senses.definition_sw: mahali ambapo wavulana hufundzwa tabia nzuri na wazee
senses.definition_dg: Phatu ambapo alume a kare anahutana ili kufundza avulana namna ya kuishi na tabia nono.

examples.dg: Avulana ahala mafundzo romeni kula kpwa azee.
examples.en: Young men received teachings at the rome from the elders.
examples.sw: Vijana walipata mafunzo kutoka kwa wazee mahali pa rome.

senses.definition_dg: Kulonda chitu, kutaka chitu au kuhenda chitu.

examples.en: I want water, I am thirsty.
examples.sw: Nataka maji, nina kiu.

senses.definition_en: leg of an animal, the joint of meat from the leg
senses.definition_dg: Mgulu wa nyama, sehemu ya nyama ya mgulu.

examples.en: He bought a leg of beef at the shop.
examples.sw: Alinunua rondo la ng'ombe dukani.

senses.definition_dg: Kuimba (neno risiro ra kawaida sana).

examples.en: The women are singing wedding songs.
examples.sw: Wanawake wanaimba nyimbo za arusi.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala mbere na kuaonyesa anjina njira. Kuongoza.

examples.en: The teacher is leading the students.
examples.sw: Mwalimu anaongoza wanafunzi.

senses.definition_dg: Mulume kuhala mchetu kukala mkpwaziye. Kuoa.

examples.en: He married a girl from this village.
examples.sw: Alioa msichana wa kijiji hiki.

senses.definition_dg: Kuangaliya chitu dza mchezo au tendo kpwa makini.

examples.en: We are going to watch a football match.
examples.sw: Tunaenda kutazama mpira.

senses.definition_dg: Kungodzera mutu au chitu.

examples.en: I am waiting for father here.
examples.sw: Ninamsubiri baba hapa.

senses.definition_dg: Kutundza mutu na kumuhendekera mambo kpwa upendo.

examples.dg: Mamaye anamurodoma mwanawe ambaye ana ugonjwa.
examples.en: His mother is caring for her child who is sick.
examples.sw: Mama yake anamtunza mtoto wake ambaye ni mgonjwa.

senses.definition_dg: Wakati wa ligundzu, bada ya kucha na kabla ya muhana.

examples.dg: Rugundzu ni wakati wa kuphiya kazini.
examples.en: Morning is the time to go to work.
examples.sw: Asubuhi ni wakati wa kwenda kazini.

senses.definition_en: deceitfulness, a lie, a falsehood, an untruth
senses.definition_dg: Maneno ambago si ga kpweli. Handzo, udanganyifu.

examples.en: Don't believe lies, seek the truth.
examples.sw: Usiamini uongo, tafuta ukweli.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya laini ya hawi ya mwana mdide kitswani ambayo inaungana na kuwa gumu akula.

examples.en: Don't touch the fontanel of a small baby.
examples.sw: Usishike utosi wa mtoto mdogo.

senses.definition_en: , kulavya to give permission, to permit
senses.definition_dg: Idhini au kukubaliya mutu ahende chitu.

examples.en: I am asking for permission to leave early.
examples.sw: Naomba ruhusa kuondoka mapema.

senses.definition_dg: Kukubali mutu ahende chitu, kumpha idhini.

examples.dg: Baba waruhusu mwanawe aphiye mudzi wa jirani.
examples.en: The father allowed his child to go to the neighbouring village.
examples.sw: Baba alimruhusu mtoto wake aende kijiji cha jirani.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu cha kupimira na kupigia mistari.

examples.dg: Hala rula upige mstari wa kunyooha.
examples.en: Take the ruler and draw a straight line.
examples.sw: Chukua rula upige mstari ulionyooka.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya ryango.

examples.dg: Rumira ni neno ranjina ra ryango.
examples.en: Rumira is another word for ryango (doorway).
examples.sw: Rumira ni neno lingine la lango.

senses.definition_dg: Kudzigaya mwenye kpwa makosa au kpwa kukosekana kpwa makini.

examples.en: He hurt himself falling from the tree.
examples.sw: Alijiumia alipoanguka kutoka mtini.

senses.definition_dg: Muanga wa dzuwa wa hatari unaphenya wakati wa mvula na radi. Umeme wa asili.

examples.en: Lightning struck the tree and burnt it.
examples.sw: Umeme ulipiga mti na kuuunguza.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhala asali kula kpwa nyuchi.

examples.en: Father is going to harvest honey in the bush.
examples.sw: Baba anakwenda kuvuna asali porini.

senses.definition_en: to be small for one's age, to be stunted, to grow slowly
senses.definition_dg: Kukala mdide kuriko inavyotarajiwa kpwa umri wako. Kukula kpwa pole-pole.

examples.dg: Mwana iye warundiha, kakakula dza anache anjina.
examples.en: That child is stunted, he hasn't grown like other children.
examples.sw: Mtoto yule amezorota kukua, hajakua kama watoto wengine.

senses.definition_en: to accumulate, pile up, store in large quantities
senses.definition_dg: Kuika vitu vingi phenye phatu phwenga, kurundika.

examples.en: He piled up sacks of cassava in the house.
examples.sw: Alirundika magunia ya muhogo nyumbani.

senses.definition_dg: Kulunga-lunga mutu au chitu kpwa njira iyo-iyo.

examples.en: The goat is following another goat.
examples.sw: Mbuzi anafuata mbuzi mwingine.

senses.definition_dg: Fimbo nono ya kuhendwa kupigira. Mti mzito wa kupigira.

examples.dg: Mzee watsukula rungu kpwa kpwe kudzirinda.
examples.en: The elder carried a club for his own protection.
examples.sw: Mzee alibeba rungu kwa ajili ya kujilinda.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya mwiri ya mchetu ambayo inatoa maziya kpwa kunyonyesa mwana.

examples.en: The baby is suckling its mother's breast.
examples.sw: Mtoto ananyonya titi la mama yake.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya runyaho.

examples.dg: Runyao ni neno ranjina ra runyaho.
examples.en: Runyao is another word for runyaho (breast).
examples.sw: Runyao ni neno lingine la runyaho (titi).

senses.definition_dg: Chiungo cha ndani ya kano ambacho chinatumiwa kuonja chakurya na kugomba.

examples.dg: Ruraka rwangu rwaphya kpwa chakurya cha moho.
examples.en: My tongue was burnt by hot food.
examples.sw: Ulimi wangu uliungua kwa chakula cha moto.

senses.definition_dg: Chiungo cha ndani ya kano chinatumiwa kuonja na kugomba. Sawa na ruraka.

examples.dg: Rurimi ni chiungo muhimu kpwa kugomba.
examples.en: The tongue is an important organ for speaking.
examples.sw: Ulimi ni kiungo muhimu kwa kuongea.

senses.definition_dg: Kulalamika kpwa sauti ya tsini bila kupendezwa na mambo.

examples.en: Don't grumble uselessly, speak and be heard.
examples.sw: Usinungunike bure, sema usikiwe.

senses.definition_en: to perspire, to sweat, to melt
senses.definition_dg: Kutoa jasho kpwa mwiri, au chitu kuiyeyuka kpwa moho.

examples.dg: Anarurumuka kpwa sababu ya dzuwa kali.
examples.en: He is sweating because of the hot sun.
examples.sw: Anatoka jasho kwa sababu ya jua kali.

senses.definition_dg: Kumhembeleza mutu kpwa maneno matamu ili akupende.

examples.en: A woman is not seduced by crying
examples.sw: Mwanamke hatongozwi kwa sahani — methali ya Kidigo.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya mmea ambayo ina rangi nono na kunuka vizuri. Ua.

examples.dg: Maruwa ga muhi uhu gana rangi nono.
examples.en: The flowers of this tree have beautiful colours.
examples.sw: Maua ya mti huu yana rangi nzuri.

equivalents_sw: kutokwa na damu kwa wingi baada ya kukatwa

senses.definition_en: to bleed profusely after being cut
senses.definition_sw: kutokwa na damu kwa wingi baada ya kukatwa
senses.definition_dg: Kutoa milatso minji bada ya kukatwa au kuumizwa.

examples.en: The wound is bleeding profusely.
examples.sw: Jeraha linatoa damu nyingi.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya tsini ya mgulu ambayo inakanyaga ardhini.

examples.dg: Ruwayo rwangu rwa mgulu rwa kulia rwanauma.
examples.en: The sole of my right foot is hurting.
examples.sw: Wayo wa mguu wangu wa kulia unaumia.

senses.definition_dg: Ngozi kuumizwa na kudondoka kiasi kidogo, hasa kpwa kugbwa au kugongana.

examples.en: He was bruised on the knee when he fell from the bicycle.
examples.sw: Alichubuka goti alipoanguka kutoka kwa baiskeli.

senses.definition_dg: Mambo yanayoonekana kpwa achili au ndosoni. Maono ga Mlungu au ndoso.

examples.en: He had a wonderful vision at night.
examples.sw: Aliota ndoto ya ajabu usiku.

equivalents_sw: kuwa na chumvi ama sukari nyingi

senses.definition_sw: kuwa na chumvi ama sukari nyingi
senses.definition_dg: Kukala na chumvi au sukari nyinji-nyinji hadi kukosekana kpwa uzuri wa ladha.

examples.dg: Ukaona madzi ga bahari tagakala pepho, ni munyu muhuphu hata madzi ga mvula gakamenya miaka mihahu go ga ruza vivyo
examples.en: You know that there is no fresh water at sea, it's full of salt and even if it rained for 3 years it would still be so salty
examples.sw: Maji ya bahari yana chumvi nyingi, hayawezi kunywa.

senses.definition_dg: Kutiya chakurya kanoni na kukumena na kumiza.

examples.dg: Hurya chakurya mara tahu kpwa siku.
examples.en: We eat food three times a day.
examples.sw: Tunakula chakula mara tatu kwa siku.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na ukali, dza chisu au panga.

examples.en: Don't pick it up, the knife is very sharp
examples.sw: Usishike; kisu kinakali sana.

equivalents_en: quiver in which arrows are kept

senses.definition_en: quiver in which arrows are kept
senses.definition_dg: Chitu cha kuhifadhiya na kutsukuliya mivi. Chifuko cha mivi cha kare.

examples.dg: Hangu kare jadi mutu nkuphiya windzani na uha na ryaka ra mivi
examples.en: An old custom is that a person goes hunting with a bow and a quiver of arrows
examples.sw: Tangu zamani mtu huenda kuwinda na upinde na ala ya mishale.

senses.definition_dg: Kukanyaga chitu chibaya kpwa mgulu, dza mavi au chongo.

examples.dg: Niryanga chongo njira ikanitiya kpwa makosa.
examples.en: I stepped on something unpleasant on the road accidentally.
examples.sw: Nilikanyaga kitu kibaya njiani kwa bahati mbaya.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu pha kuinjirira nyumbani, phatu phapana pha kutsupira.

examples.en: Stand at the doorway and wait for me.
examples.sw: Simama pale langoni unisumbiri.
